seo.title: Lightning Mounting Services | Expert Handyman in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Top-rated handyman in Dallas offering TV mounting, furniture assembly, and home repairs. Call (469) 578-4886 for fast, professional service.

hero.headline: Expert Handyman Services for Your Home & Office
hero.subheadline: From TV mounting to furniture assembly, we handle it all with precision and care.

featureSections.title: Perfectly Mounted TVs Every Time
featureSections.body: We specialize in mounting TVs of all sizes, ensuring a clean, secure installation. Our team uses premium mounts and stud-finding technology for safety and aesthetics.
featureSections.cardBody: Our technicians are trained to handle delicate electronics and heavy mounts, giving you peace of mind.

featureSections.title: Hassle-Free Furniture Assembly
featureSections.body: Don't waste hours with confusing instructions. We assemble all brands and types of furniture quickly and correctly, leaving you with sturdy, ready-to-use pieces.
bullets: Flat-pack to finished in no time
featureSections.cardBody: We've assembled thousands of pieces — from IKEA to custom builds — ensuring every screw is tight.

whyChooseUs.title: 5-Star Service
whyChooseUs.description: Our perfect 5.0 rating reflects our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast & Reliable
whyChooseUs.description: We arrive on time and complete most jobs the same day, respecting your busy schedule.

whyChooseUs.title: Full-Service Handyman
whyChooseUs.description: Beyond mounting and assembly, we handle minor repairs, shelving, and more.

whyChooseUs.title: 100% Satisfaction
whyChooseUs.description: If you're not happy, we'll make it right. No questions asked.

testimonials.quote: They mounted my 75-inch TV perfectly and hid all the wires. Looks amazing!
testimonials.author: John D.

testimonials.quote: Fast, friendly, and affordable. I've used them for multiple projects.

testimonials.quote: Best handyman in Dallas. They assembled my entire office furniture in one day.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subheadline: Call us today for a free quote and same-day service.

servicesPage.intro: Lightning Mounting Services offers a full range of handyman solutions for Dallas homes and businesses. From TV mounting to furniture assembly and beyond, we deliver fast, professional results every time.

services.title: TV Mounting
services.shortDescription: Professional TV mounting for any size, with cable management.
services.longDescription: Our expert team mounts TVs from 19 to 85 inches on any wall surface. We use heavy-duty mounts, find studs precisely, and hide cables for a clean look. Same-day service available.
benefits: Works on drywall, brick, or concrete

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss TV size, wall type, and optimal viewing height.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We mount the bracket, secure the TV, and route cables neatly.

process.title: Final Check
process.description: We test stability, level, and connectivity before you enjoy.

faqs.question: Can you mount a TV on a brick wall?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have the tools and anchors for brick, concrete, and other masonry.

faqs.question: Do you provide the mount?
faqs.answer: We can use your mount or provide a high-quality one at an additional cost.

services.title: Furniture Assembly
services.shortDescription: Quick and correct assembly for all furniture brands.
services.longDescription: Save time and frustration. We assemble IKEA, Wayfair, Amazon, and any other flat-pack furniture. Our team arrives with all necessary tools and follows instructions precisely for a sturdy build.
benefits: Works with any brand or style
Furniture placed exactly where you want

process.title: Unboxing
process.description: We organize parts and verify everything is included.

process.title: Assembly
process.description: We follow instructions step-by-step for a perfect build.

process.title: Placement
process.description: We move the finished piece to your desired location and clean up.

faqs.question: How long does assembly take?
faqs.answer: A typical dresser takes 1-2 hours; a full office can be done in a day.

faqs.question: Do you assemble outdoor furniture?
faqs.answer: Yes, we assemble patio sets, gazebos, and more.

services.title: Home Repairs
services.shortDescription: Minor repairs and maintenance for your home.
services.longDescription: From fixing leaky faucets to patching drywall, our handyman services cover a wide range of home repairs. We handle small jobs that other contractors won't touch, saving you time and hassle.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We inspect the issue and explain the solution.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We fix the problem efficiently with proper techniques.

process.title: Cleanup
process.description: We leave your space clean and tidy.

faqs.question: Do you do electrical work?
faqs.answer: We handle minor electrical like outlet swaps, but refer major jobs to licensed electricians.

faqs.question: Can you paint a room?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer interior painting services.

services.title: Shelving & Storage
services.shortDescription: Custom shelving installation for any room.
services.longDescription: Maximize your space with custom shelving. We install floating shelves, bookcases, closet organizers, and garage storage systems. Our work is precise and sturdy, designed to hold your items safely.
benefits: Custom designs to fit your space

process.title: Design
process.description: We measure and plan the perfect shelving layout.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We securely mount shelves using appropriate anchors.

process.title: Styling
process.description: We ensure shelves are level and ready for your items.

faqs.question: Can you install shelves in a closet?
faqs.answer: Absolutely, we specialize in closet organization systems.

faqs.question: Do you supply the shelves?
faqs.answer: We can use your shelves or recommend and supply quality options.

about.headline: About Lightning Mounting Services
about.mission: To provide Dallas with reliable, high-quality handyman services that make life easier.
story: Lightning Mounting Services was founded in Dallas with a simple mission: deliver fast, professional handyman work at fair prices. What started as a TV mounting side gig quickly grew into a full-service handyman business serving homeowners and businesses across the city.

Today, we're proud to maintain a perfect 5.0 rating by focusing on customer satisfaction, punctuality, and craftsmanship. Every job, big or small, gets the same attention to detail. We're not happy until you're thrilled.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use the best materials and techniques for lasting results.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up on time and finish when promised.

coreValues.title: Transparency
coreValues.description: Upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and time with respect.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready for expert handyman service? Call or fill out our form.
